category_sources: Official Erlang documentation site describes Erlang/OTP documentation, the language, runtime system, and libraries.
source_facts.description says Erlang is a programming language for highly scalable real-time systems.
display_name_sources: Official site documentation is branded Erlang/OTP.
source_facts.repo points to erlang/otp and source_facts.name is erlang.
docs_sources: Official Erlang Reference Manual describes the Erlang language.
Official erlang.org documentation page is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/erlang/otp; repo lookup intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: Official Erlang documentation covers the language, runtime system, OTP libraries, and system principles.
source_facts.description identifies scalable real-time systems programming.
